detail: Item 19 reports Average Annual Sales (total billed amounts) for existing Anago subfranchisors. The Item 19 population consists of current Anago subfranchisors operating under the same fee structure (5% royalty, 2% admin support, $550/mo NBDS) as disclosed in Item 6 for new franchisees. There is no pro-forma or illustrative model using a different royalty rate or fee tier. The AAS metric represents gross billings, not a cost build-up or profit estimate, so there is no embedded fee-structure dependency in the disclosed figure. The only fee change at renewal is the minimum royalty floor (average of last year), which does not affect the AAS metric since AAS measures gross sales, not fee burden. No cohort comparability discrepancy found.
scorecard_note: Item 19 cohort comparability: no discrepancy found. All disclosed subfranchisors operate under same fee structure as current new franchisees.
